item.title: In this Dump: No Homo, Sir Chuckles McFurrypants, and a Powdered Donut
item.description:
A hell of a line indeed. *fans self*
Did I upload this dump from a delayed yet moving train with borked wifi via my phone? Yes I did. Was that a good idea that didn't take any time or data at all? No it wasn't. The things we do for memes....

item.title: This time of year, peace is an option. Even for geese
item.description: Happy Holidays my weird, anonymous family! MV Edit: I truly appreciate this community. Endless wit and the perfect distraction! Be well imgur :)
item.dc:creator: SugarTeet

item.title: Some mental illness and neurodivergent memes
item.description:
I haven't been doing well, and this time of year, maybe others aren't either.
It's been a terrible year personally in addition to the mess of a world we live in.
And now I'm stuck at home with Covid, with nothing to get me through but the internet and my own thoughts.
So join me in laughing through the darkness today
While white-knuckling onto the incredibly faint hope that tomorrow could be better.
Happy solstice, folks! In case you need to hear it, I appreciate you and I'm happy you are here.
item.dc:creator: ThisIsMyMegaron

item.title: You can have both of these thoughts
item.description: Hating all of a people for what some of them have done is evil too. Yes, I see you False Equivalency knights running this way - just because you find other evil in the recent vicinity does not excuse new evil. Most viral edit: Do something nice for someone today just because you can.
item.dc:creator: Randazzo

item.title: Happy holidays!!
item.description: Hope everyone gets what they want! Edit: I’ve never gone viral before I’m not sure what I’m supposed to do! Thanks for the upvotes! Please feel free to look at my favorites and please don’t judge!!!

item.title: And it happend again. For the 9th time this year.
item.description: https://www.eurogamer.net/war-thunder-players-leak-military-documents-on-forums-again. TL:Dr; On 12th December, a user posted a manual for the M2A2 Bradley infantry fighting vehicle on the War Thunder forums. Making it the 9th time someone leaked classified/restrictred info.
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: One Smart Lady!
item.description: Though she’s not alone

item.title: Bottom shelf memes that are...kinda neat, I suppose.
item.description:
@jkbenton comedy gold.
@HileyNoteson Yōőọôòºöøo!
We're abbreviating Mathew to Math now as well.
You can catch me live on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka streaming with my favorite Imgurians from the Bottom Shelf Community server.
Join for the games! We've been playing Pay Day 3, GTA V, Jackbox, Among Us, 7 Days to Die, Sea of Thieves, Red Dead Redemption 2, Barotrauma, Ultimate Chicken Horse...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving Imgurian there to play it with you. Join for the memes! Imgurians share memes in the meme dumpster 24/7 Join for the Awe! Pay your pet taxes in the pet tex channel Join for the NSFW memes! Join to chat with hilarious people! Join to lurk in the corners! Join for the shockingly magnificent balance of wholesomeness and chaos. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
Mr. Nutterbutt tax. Glad I took a picture of the tree at its prime...because most of those ornaments are on the floor now. RIP, all of Christmas.
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: It's meme dump day ... Again... Vol 90
item.description:
Happy winter solstice friends. Hope you are enjoying the Longest Night, or at least anticipating the return of the sun.
It's barely a secret anyway
Me right now, stuck in a weird head space.
This, so much. You are you, and that's enough of a reason
I was meant to be a cat
Ahhh my lovely birth month.
Someday I'll have my house with a mossy yard in the middle of a forest. I'll keep dreaming about it til then.
It's really the best cuz then you're like....
Mmhm
.
Or at least make you laugh at all your bad feelings
.
Meeeeeee but also I just like big words cuz language is fun
Just Cat Things
This is why I went from speed reading through novels to looking at memes. Fuck.
Seriously what was this about? Why were people making fun of men for grooming lol
.
Some evidence*
Laying on the floor listening to the album and reading the lyrics? Prime
"Fuck you gonna do?" Hobbes, probably.
Only some kinds of crimes. For legal purposes this is a joke and I totally don't commit crimes.
;)
Birding is probably good for the soul. Ask @CodyBurkett
Yeah, definitely.
I don't know but it's probably important somehow.
This makes me laugh so hard every time I see it.
.
Eyy this is why I stopped doing photography for money. But boy I miss the money.
This movie was scary as shit. I loved it and I'm not that into horror.
My kid just says "okay!" As he continues to do the fucking thing.
Yes. And I better find it cuz it's Christmas. Yikes.
I love this way of thinking. I hope this helps someone else.
All the damn time.
I mean look at them.
.
Ok look I know he's morally reprehensible but that evil lair though.
This is what it felt like for me growing up.
Stupid bullshit is what that is.
Damn.
Just because I'm being stupid doesn't mean you should be
I haaaaaate this.
Sitting outside in the gentle breeze is good times though
.
Warmth is kindness.
I say this all the time and it never gets any laughs
I just got the worst shitty stuff I've had since fucking high school. What is a good way to use some schwaggy weed, y'all? I'm not clever at this stuff.
Well....
THT tax
Trippy Kitty tax
Hobbes sneaking into my dresser and fuzzing all over my clothes tax
item.dc:creator: kaeldra

item.title: The 374th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps - D&D MeeMays ep 9
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
Starting January 1st, I will have a new Signature Image. One I had commissioned. It's so cute. FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #DandD #DandDump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple
item.dc:creator: PyroDragon
